releases.author: silloi
releases.description:
Initial release that enhances Obsidian note-taking with Gyazo captures.

## Key Features

- Browse Gyazo captures in a dedicated sidebar
- Copy image embeddings with a single click
- Easy insertion with drag & drop functionality
- View metadata in detailed view
- Support for free accounts (latest 10 captures) and Pro accounts (up to 100 captures)
- Full English and Japanese interface support
releases.name: Version 1.0.0: Official Release
